items.name: LoRaWAN-Dashboard
items.description: Real-time Water Quality Monitoring Dashboard for LoRaWAN IoT networks. Receives pH and battery telemetry from an ESP32+LoRa node via ChirpStack, processes it through a Google Apps Script webhook, and visualizes live sensor data on a React + Chart.js frontend using WebSocket (Socket.io).
